title: melissa coccinea
intro: Melissa coccinea, also known as the red melissa or lemon balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular remedy for soothing digestive issues and calming the nervous system. The health benefits of Melissa coccinea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of IBS and cold sores. Melissa coccinea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
